description: A graphic combining a photograph with a captioned headline banner. The upper two-thirds is a color photograph taken inside an industrial warehouse or training facility: a woman in a green blazer and white hard hat with safety glasses is shaking hands with people, several of whom wear numbered hard hats (38, 51, 61), safety glasses, and gray work shirts. Lifting equipment, pallet racking, and scaffolding are in the background. A faint embossed U.S. Department of Labor seal is in the lower-right corner. Across the bottom is a navy label tab reading 'Labor News' in white italic serif, with several vertical accent bars, above a bold white serif headline on a dark band: 'US Department of Labor launches landmark initiative to integrate artificial intelligence skills into Registered Apprenticeships nationwide.' The lower-right reads 'DOL.GOV'.
notable_text: Labor News / US Department of Labor launches landmark initiative to integrate artificial intelligence skills into Registered Apprenticeships nationwide / DOL.GOV
